name: Karthik Subramanian
title: Senior SDET | Flutter Developer | Android Release Management | QE Automation Engineer
summary: Senior SDET with 9+ years of experience in banking and financial services across test automation, quality engineering, Flutter application development, and Android release management. Strong hands-on experience in TypeScript, Cypress, API automation, CI/CD, Flutter, Dart, Android delivery workflows, and hosted web experiences. Proven track record in customer onboarding, lending, deposits, CRM, and risk-assessment systems, with a hybrid engineering profile that combines mobile product development with scalable QE/SDET ownership.
highlights: Strong hybrid profile across mobile development + SDET/QE automation
Built and published Flutter-based Android applications through Google Play Store
Strong banking domain exposure across customer onboarding, lending, deposits, mobile channels, and risk workflows
Azure CI/CD pipeline automation and deployment strategies
Firebase integration for parsing and cloud synchronization in SMS Stack
